summary: Comprehensive testing of URL Scrapers and Manual Metrics features for Facebook & Instagram. All 15 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI components verified: Social Dashboard loads, Analytics tab shows platform rows with posts column, Credential modal has URL connect mode with manual metrics form.
critical_code_review_comments: URL detection correctly identifies Facebook and Instagram URLs with various formats (with/without www, with @, profile.php?id=, etc.)
connect-url endpoint properly handles manual_metrics parameter and stores them in platform_credentials collection
metrics_source field correctly indicates 'auto' or 'manual' based on how metrics were obtained
Dashboard metrics endpoint properly merges manual_metrics into sim_metrics for display
Frontend credential modal has proper URL connect mode toggle with Profile URL input
Manual metrics form has all required fields: followers, following, posts, engagement_rate
Platform cards show 'via URL' badge for URL-connected platforms
Analytics tab shows platform performance with posts column as requested
seed_data_creation: Test data created via connect-url endpoint with manual_metrics for Facebook and Instagram
context_for_next_testing_agent: URL Scrapers and Manual Metrics features fully tested. Backend: URL detection works for FB/IG URLs, connect-url endpoint accepts manual_metrics, dashboard/platform metrics include manual metrics data. Frontend: Social dashboard at /social shows 6 connected platforms (Instagram, Twitter/X, Facebook, TikTok, YouTube, Snapchat), Analytics tab shows platform performance with posts column, Credential modal has URL connect mode with manual metrics form. Facebook shows 'Manual Metrics Test' and Instagram shows 'Manual IG Test' - both connected via URL with manual metrics fallback. Test credentials: owner@bigmannentertainment.com / Test1234!

url_detection.Various IG URL formats: PASS - www, non-www, with @, trailing slash

connect_url.POST /api/social/connect-url (Instagram): PASS - Connects via URL, returns metrics_source

metrics_endpoints.GET /api/social/metrics/dashboard: PASS - Returns aggregated metrics including manual data
metrics_endpoints.GET /api/social/metrics/platforms: PASS - Shows FB/IG with correct data and posts column
metrics_endpoints.GET /api/social/url-supported: PASS - Lists FB and IG as URL-supported platforms
metrics_endpoints.GET /api/social/connections: PASS - Shows has_url_connect and connection_method fields

frontend.Analytics tab: PASS - Shows platform performance with posts column (323, 266, 361 posts)
frontend.Platform cards: PASS - Show 'via URL' badge for URL-connected platforms
frontend.Credential modal URL mode: PASS - Has Profile URL input and Quick Connect section
frontend.Manual metrics toggle: PASS - Shows 'Add metrics manually (if auto-fetch fails)'
frontend.Manual metrics form: PASS - Has followers, following, posts, engagement_rate fields
frontend.Connect with URL button: PASS - Cyan button for URL-based connection

note_on_meta_scraping: As documented, Meta platforms (Facebook/Instagram) block server-side scraping from cloud IPs. The manual_metrics fallback is the key feature that allows users to enter their metrics manually when auto-scrape fails. This is working as designed.
